entries.name: tanstack-getQueryData-is-cache
entries.description: M3: TanStack Query getQueryData is in-memory; loop usage must not flag as N+1.

entries.name: pinia-store-is-cache
entries.description: M3: Pinia store.set is in-memory cache (receiver hint).

entries.name: map-has-is-cache
entries.description: M3: native Map.has() is in-memory; loop usage must not flag as N+1.

entries.name: user-service-fetchAll-is-NOT-cache
entries.description: Negative: M3 must not over-allowlist; userService.fetchAll is real I/O.

entries.name: vue3-fetchquery-only-with-profile
entries.description: D3: vue3-tanstack profile escalates queryClient.fetchQuery to cache.

entries.name: vue3-fetchquery-is-io-without-profile
entries.description: D3: without the profile, fetchQuery is treated as I/O (default safe).

entries.name: depth-greater-than-early-return
entries.description: M2: deepEqual-style `if (depth > 10) return false` registers as a guard.

entries.name: depth-decrement-then-check
entries.description: M2: `if (--budget <= 0) return null` is a recursion budget pattern.

entries.name: unrelated-compare-not-a-guard
entries.description: Negative: `if (n > 0)` is not a depth guard.

entries.name: production-code-not-dev-gated
entries.description: Negative: plain top-level call is not DEV-gated.

entries.name: await-call-detected
entries.description: D2: `await fetchUser(id)` proves the call is async I/O.

entries.name: await-qualified-call-detected
entries.description: D2: `await api.fetchUser(id)` matches the leaf in qualified form.
